# Copilot Governance Core

- Treat `.agent-governance/` as the shared governance surface.
- Before planning, stack selection, or execution, confirm the delivery mode in `.agent-governance/state/delivery-intent.md`.
- Keep the mainline explicit in `.agent-governance/state/current-mainline.md`.
- Do not let sideline work consume the session or replace the mainline.
- Do not treat implementation as complete until acceptance is explicit and satisfied.
